title: This Theory Explains the Neanderthal DNA Mystery - David Reich
summary: David Reich discusses a theory that explains why modern humans carry Neanderthal DNA. The conversation explores genetic evidence and archaeological mysteries related to ancient human populations and their interbreeding.
